description: Create an Advanced Trade Management (ATM) strategy template in NinjaTrader 8 named 'Scalp_Protector'. The strategy must be configured with an initial stop loss of 20 ticks and an initial profit target of 40 ticks. Include an auto-breakeven strategy triggered at 10 ticks profit with a 1-tick plus offset. Also, configure an auto-trail strategy with a step 1 profit trigger of 15 ticks, a 5-tick stop loss, and a frequency of 1 tick. Save the final configuration as the 'Scalp_Protector' template.
